title: May 22
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|May}}

'''May 22''' is the 142nd day of the year (143rd in leap years). There are 223 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1930s#1934|1934]] – [[Fred Roos]] is born.
*[[1940s#1945|1945]] – [[Carlos Garzón]] is born.
*[[1979]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 26|''Star Wars'' (1977) 26]] published.
*[[2002]] – ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File 21]]'' published.
*[[2003]] – ''[[The Kitonak Connection]]'' mini-adventure released.
*[[2008]] – [[Harry Lange]] dies.
*[[2009]] – [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars: Decoded'']] version of "[[Destroy Malevolence|Destroy ''Malevolence'']]" airs.
*[[2013]] – [[Legacy (2013) 3|''Legacy'' (2013) 3]] published.
*2013 – [[Dawn of the Jedi: The Prisoner of Bogan 5|''Dawn of the Jedi: The Prisoner of Bogan'' 5]] published.
*[[2018]] – [[Dinah L. Moché]] dies.
*[[2019]] – [[Kamino]] added to Capital Supremacy in [[Star Wars Battlefront II]].
*2019 – [[Age of Rebellion - Jabba the Hutt 1|''Age of Rebellion - Jabba the Hutt'' 1]] published.
*2019 – [[Galaxy's Edge 2|''Galaxy's Edge'' 2]] published.
*[[2020]] – "[[Technology (Disney Gallery: The Mandalorian)|Technology]]" published on [[Disney+]].
*[[2024]] – [[Star Wars (2020) 46|''Star Wars'' (2020) 46]] published.
*[[2026]] – ''[[Star Wars: The Mandalorian and Grogu]]'' to be released.
<noinclude>
